memoryArtifacts.headline: Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig
memoryArtifacts.description:
Ednyfed Fychan
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Ednyfed Fychan (c. 1170 – 1246), full name Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig, was a Welsh warrior who became seneschal to the Kingdom of Gwynedd in Northe …

popularStory.headline: Memerial
popularStory.description: A distinguished general and able Minister of Prince Llywelyn "Magnus", comtemporary 13th century. Seneschal to Llywelyn ab Iorwerth, about 1215. Witness to the Peace of Worcester, 1218. Witness to the …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules於大約1150年出生在威爾士安格萊利朗福尼時，他的父親Einion Fychan ap Einion-69歲，母親Angharad ferch Ednyfed Fychan-33歲。他於1165年與Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch在威爾士安格萊利朗福尼結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他於1215年在英國威爾斯尼德被列為distain of gwynedd。他去世於1246年7月在威爾士凱爾納方史爾凱爾納方享年97歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯康維利安德利洛--o斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules于大约1150年出生在威尔士安格萊利朗福尼时，他的父亲Einion Fychan ap Einion-69岁，母亲Angharad ferch Ednyfed Fychan-33岁。他于1165年与Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch在威尔士安格萊利朗福尼结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他于1215年在英国威尔斯尼德被列为distain of gwynedd。他去世于1246年7月在威尔士凱爾納方史爾凱爾納方享年97岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯康維利安德利洛--o斯。

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

en.lifeSummary: When Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules was born about 1150, in Llangefni, Anglesey, Wales, his father, Einion Fychan ap Einion, was -69 and his mother, Angharad ferch Ednyfed Fychan, was -33. He married Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch in 1165, in Llangefni, Anglesey, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. In 1215, at the age of 66, his occupation is listed as distain of gwynedd in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom. He died in July 1246, in Caernarfon, Caernarfonshire, Wales, at the age of 97, and was buried in Llandrillo-yn-Rhôs, Conwy, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules est né environ 1150, à Llangefni, Anglesey, Galles, son père, Einion Fychan ap Einion, avait -69 ans et sa mère, Angharad ferch Ednyfed Fychan, avait -33 ans. Il a épousé Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch en 1165, à Llangefni, Anglesey, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. En 1215, à l’âge de 66 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est distain of gwynedd à Gwynedd, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en juillet 1246, à Caernarfon, Caernarfonshire, Galles, à l’âge de 97 ans, et a été enterré à Llandrillo-yn-Rhôs, Conwy, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules um 1150 in Llangefni, Anglesey, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Einion Fychan ap Einion -69 und seine Mutter Angharad ferch Ednyfed Fychan -33. Er hat 1165 in Llangefni, Anglesey, Wales Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. 1215, als er 66 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als distain of gwynedd in Gwynedd, Wales, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb im Juli 1246 im Alter von 97 Jahren in Caernarfon, Caernarfonshire, Wales und wurde in Llandrillo-yn-Rhôs, Conwy, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules è nato il circa 1150 nel Llangefni, Anglesey, Galles, il suo padre, Einion Fychan ap Einion, aveva -69 anni e il suo madre, Angharad ferch Ednyfed Fychan, aveva -33 anni. Lui sposato Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch nel 1165, nel Llangefni, Anglesey, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Nel 1215, all'età di 66 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come distain of gwynedd nel Gwynedd, Galles, Regno Unito. Morì nel luglio 1246, nel Caernarfon, Caernarfonshire, Galles, all'età di 97 anni, e fu sepolto a Llandrillo-yn-Rhôs, Conwy, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dulesが約1150年にウェールズアングレセイランジェフニで生まれた時，父Einion Fychan ap Einionは-69歳，母Angharad ferch Ednyfed Fychanは-33歳であった。1165年にウェールズアングレセイランジェフニでLady Tangwystl ferch Llywarchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。1215年，66歳の時，イギリスウェールズグウイネッドでの職業はdistain of gwyneddと記録されている。彼は1246年7月にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアケエルナルフォンで97歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズコンウイランドリロ-イン-ルhoスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules(이)가 대략 1150년 웨일스 앤글레시 랭프니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Einion Fychan ap Einion(은)는 -69세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad ferch Ednyfed Fychan(은)는 -33세였다. 그는 1165년 웨일스 앤글레시 랭프니에서 Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 1215년, 66세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 웨일스 그윈드에서 distain of gwynedd이었다. 그는 1246년 7월 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 카이른아르폰에서 97세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 콘w이 랜드릴로-이-ho스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules nasceu aproximadamente 1150, em Llangefni, Anglesey, Gales, seu pai, Einion Fychan ap Einion, tinha -69 anos e sua mãe, Angharad ferch Ednyfed Fychan, tinha -33 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch em 1165, em Llangefni, Anglesey, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Em 1215, com 66 anos, sua profissão aparece como distain of gwynedd em Gwynedd, Gales, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em julho de 1246, em Caernarfon, Caernarfonshire, Gales, com 97 anos, e foi sepultado em Llandrillo-yn-Rhôs, Conwy, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules родился около 1150 г. в местности ллангефни, англеси, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Einion Fychan ap Einion было -69 год, а матери, которую звали Angharad ferch Ednyfed Fychan, -33. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch в 1165 г. в местности ллангефни, англеси, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. В 1215 году, в возрасте 66 лет,  он работал по профессии distain of gwynedd в местности гвинедд, Уэльс, Великобритания. Он умер июль 1246 г. в местности каирнарфон, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс в возрасте 97 лет и был похоронен в местности лландрилло-ин-рoс, конви, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules nació aproximadamente 1150, en Llangefni, Isla Oscura, Gales, su papá, Einion Fychan ap Einion, tenía -69 años y su mamá, Angharad ferch Ednyfed Fychan, tenía -33 años. Se casó con Lady Tangwystl ferch Llywarch en 1165, en Llangefni, Isla Oscura, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. En 1215, a la edad de 66 años, su ocupación registrada era distain of gwynedd en Gwynedd, Gales, Reino Unido. Murió en julio de 1246, en Caernarfon, Caernarfonshire, Gales, a la edad de 97 años, y fue sepultado en Llandrillo-yn-Rhôs, Conwy, Gales, Reino Unido.
